system.description:
Influencers are the runners who realized, somewhere on the way up, that an audience is a kind of armor. They came up on stream platforms, in the loyalty-program militias of the upper towers, or as the carefully styled mouthpiece of a fixer who needed a public face. They cultivate a following the way an Armament cultivates a loadout, and they bring it with them everywhere.

On the job, the Influencer's reach is the asset. They can flash-mob a checkpoint, sway a hostile crowd into something more useful, or surface an off-the-record detail by asking the right viewer the right way. Their critics call them shallow. Their critics also tend to underestimate the body count that follows a sufficiently popular livestream.
system.grants: Audience network leverage, social swarm summons, reputation-based persuasion.

wizard.tagline: Audience-powered operator who turns a following into a weapon
